item.title: Return of the Meme: 1623 (ice cream)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. Third time trying to add text to this post, let's see if it crashes out.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Love you too!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: FREEDOM HOUSE
item.description:
Communicator is Dr Joel Bervell, a mastermind medical mythbuster specializing in misdiagnosis of patients of color. Scene is from The Pitt, season 1. Freedom House also pioneered the 911 system to call and respond with medical services within communities unserved by white hospitals.
We are proposing to award a congressional Gold Medal to these paramedics. Justice is progress
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Meta AI engineer trusts AI so much she lets it have control of her computer and it disobeys her and deletes her files

item.title: GovBrief Today #388
item.description: Europe told Donald Trump to sit down twice today. The EU formally demanded the United States honor the trade agreement Trump signed in July, after he raised tariffs to 15% through a different legal loophole hours after the Supreme Court struck down his first ones. Greenland's prime minister rejected Trump's offer to send a hospital ship, pointed out that Greenland already provides free health care, and told the president of the United States to stop making "random outbursts on social media." This is how countries behave when they have decided the current American government is not a credible partner. When allies stop being diplomatic, it means diplomacy failed. We've emailed 6,200+ stories over 388 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist [1] https://go.govbrief.today/kushner-summoned [2] https://go.govbrief.today/eu-tariff-demand [3] https://go.govbrief.today/secret-service-shooting [4] https://go.govbrief.today/precheck-reversal [5] https://go.govbrief.today/patel-olympics [6] https://go.govbrief.today/hospital-ship-rejected Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Mizora – Baldur's Gate 3

The devious cambion Mizora, servant of the Archdevil of Avernus, portrayed by FrauHaku
Human form ingame reference and cosplay
Half-fiend form, reference art by ynorka
IV
V
VI
VII
VIII
IX
Credits: cosplay and outfit by Frau Haku https://www.instagram.com/frau_haku/ https://www.deviantart.com/frauhaku Photos and edits: 1, 4-6, 9-10 by MilliganVick, and 2, 7-8 by Kira
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: With "Friends" like these, who needs enemies?
item.description:
Note: Are they in trouble? Is Boston really doing worse than Biloxi? I Massachusetts really failing while Mississippi is booming? Are we sure?
Imagine somebody writing this op/ed for the GOP, 2 former GOP officials even. "They will have to puch back against a core constituency within the Republican Party that often makes government deliver less and cost more: Christians, particularly southern, white, and evangelical Christians."
Unless you kneecap yourself and stab your own voters and most loyal base in the back, betraying them to steal their meager money and give it to billionaires like a reverse Robin Hood, "excellence" will be out of reach.
And don't worry about feeling bad or losing millions for teacher and firefighter votes and ruining their lives. And forget that Kamala lost the firefighters who Biden won which made a difference between 2024 and 2020 and the NEA and AFT are even bigger. Just shit on them right now. Do it! It's the only way to get the GOP re-elected at this point!
Oh boy! Insidious! Looks like teachers and firefighters and police and AFSME and any other union brother and sister ought to vote against Big Gretch come primary season if they don't want pay and benefit cuts and layoffs!
Oh, and who would have guessed it? Another silver-spoon do-nothing jerk from Michigan! Isn't it always the most spoiled little white bois with these opinions? Like the dweeby little ones who look like their high school extra curriculars that got them into Harvard along with daddy's million dollar checks were golf and polo? Anyways this guy can eat the ass out of all 30 million members of union households in America. With "friends" like these, who needs enemies? This is why nobody trusts Democrats. You can't just absolutely screw the teachers and the firefighters and make their lives worse and still win. It's not possible. No matter what your fancy donors at your Harvard and Yale alumni dinners think.
item.dc:creator: hufflesnuff
